get.description:
Content negotiation via the Accept header:
- application/ld+json (default) or application/json — returns JSON-LD metadata including all annotations + inbound entity references. application/json is itself a SupportedMediaType, but on this route it means metadata (accepted ambiguity): a raw application/json representation can only be fetched via Accept: application/octet-stream.
- any other SupportedMediaType, or a wildcard (image/*, */*) — returns the stored representation: charset-decoded text for text-flavored types, verbatim bytes for everything else (images, PDFs, archives, and every other admitted type).
- application/octet-stream — returns the stored representation's bytes verbatim with the true media type in Content-Type (byte-fidelity mode for checksum consumers).

Binary payloads flow directly from the content store; metadata payloads go through the bus gateway.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: application/ld+json (or application/json) for metadata; any SupportedMediaType or wildcard for the stored representation; application/octet-stream for verbatim bytes

200.description: Resource content or metadata, depending on Accept
